that feels more Arnology.

The original interactive Product Core remains untouched. The new cinematic version uses your generated workspace video with refined composition, typography, and supporting sections.

01 / Cinematic workspace

Real objects. Clearer story.

A full-width video hero where a modern workspace assembles piece by piece, representing Arnology’s combined product, engineering, and team capabilities.
